title: Channel 1
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Channel 1''' ('''Channel One''') was a [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] channel reserved for use by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] government.

In times of emergency or special announcement, the [[New Republic Ruling Council|Ruling Council]], the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|President]] or [[Fleet High Command]] could activate Channel 1 and send their message over all HoloNet nodes and channels, covering any regularly scheduled programming.

[[Nil Spaar]] successfully had Yevetha hack into Channel 1's signal and broadcast a speech across all of the New Republic warning aggressors to hold off as well as denounce President [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], or else a war would begin. The second-shift supervisor [[Turat Il Feen]] could not stop the signal from being pirated and left his station in horror, realizing he might become a grid installer afterward.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]''
